properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Out of a million you called me by name, Out from the many calls, you've chosen me, I am not worthy but you love me anyway, The joy now that have sustained me everyday.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your love is incredible, Truly, truly you never failed, Now I know what I'm sure to say, "I love you Lord, I love you Lord."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Out of your burning love you died in my instead Out from my crooked path you lead me straight ahead But I don't deserve your grace, but you give me it anyway Now I bow down my knees, Lord have it your way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I cannot fathom the deep of your love Words are not enough to express what I feel But I know you know what I feel deep inside
